_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of relevant laws, legal authorities, restrictions, and regulations pertaining to cyber defense activities.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data protection law, including GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, and sector-specific privacy regulations, with emphasis on the legal bases for processing, data subject rights, cross-border transfer mechanisms, and enforcement precedent.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI SP domain. SP-K-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-012 (DA, cosine: 0.524), RC-K-011 (RC, cosine: 0.508).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.549). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, legal, regulations]. DCWF-only terms [activities, authorities, cyber, defense, laws, pertaining] vs WIDAI-only terms [bases, border, ccpa, cpra, cross, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.906, R=0.857). P exceeds R by 0.049 — the DCWF element's 14 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 29 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Knowledge of relevant laws, legal authorities, restrictions, and regulations per" and "Knowledge of data protection law, including GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, and sector-specific" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.542 ≈ STS 0.549 (gap 0.007). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, legal, regulations] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.8%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, legal, regulations]. DCWF-only: [activities, authorities, cyber, defense, laws, pertaining]. WIDAI-only: [bases, border, ccpa, cpra, cross, data].
